tasks: From the replication results, what is the sample size of the papers in the web of science study? Report only the number.
From the replication results, what percentage of WOS citations were coded as critical/negative? Report only the number rounded to one decimal place.
From the replication results, what is the overall negative citation ratio in the Twitter network? Report only the number rounded to two decimal places.
From replication results, what is the negative citation ratio for anti-mask websites in the Twitter network? Report only the number rounded to the nearest integer number.
